patterns.description: PowerShell execution policy blocks script execution.

patterns.match: pac auth failed|Unable to authenticate|auth login failed|Not authenticated
patterns.description: PAC CLI is not authenticated to Dataverse.

patterns.match: Solution zip missing|Solution zip does not exist|SolutionZip path missing
patterns.description: Solution zip file does not exist and must be exported.

patterns.match: does not have ReadAccess right.*Connection Reference|connectionreference
patterns.fix: Assign System Customizer role to authenticated user in Power Platform Admin Center.
patterns.description: User lacks ReadAccess on Connection Reference entity.

patterns.match: unknown argument --name|Invalid value for argument|Not a valid command
patterns.fix: Remove unsupported arguments from pac command invocation.
patterns.description: PAC CLI command uses invalid or unsupported arguments.

patterns.match: solution import failed|Import failed|import returned non-zero
patterns.fix: Retry pac solution import after verifying auth and zip integrity.

patterns.match: ENV_URL not set|ENV_URL not present|Cannot export without ENV_URL
patterns.fix: Prompt user for ENV_URL and persist with setx.
patterns.description: ENV_URL environment variable is not configured.

patterns.match: Could not write to log file|being used by another process
patterns.fix: Create a new timestamped log file.
patterns.description: Log file is locked by another process.

patterns.match: pac solution publish returned non-zero|Publish failed
patterns.fix: Retry publish or publish manually via Power Platform admin center.

patterns.match: Square access token not configured|squareAccessToken.*empty|square-config.json not found
patterns.fix: Add Square credentials to square-config.json (squareAccessToken, locationId).
patterns.description: Square API credentials are missing or empty.

patterns.match: Already processed event|Duplicate event|event_id already exists
patterns.fix: Event already handled. No action needed.
patterns.description: Webhook event was already processed (duplicate delivery).

patterns.match: email-config.json not found|Email not configured|imapServer.*empty|IMAP scan requires
patterns.fix: Configure email-config.json with IMAP server, username, and password.
patterns.description: Email inbox is not configured for the email intake agent.

patterns.match: Invoice send failed|Invoice creation failed|Failed to send reminder
patterns.fix: Verify Square credentials and invoice ID. Retry or check Square Dashboard.
patterns.description: Failed to create or send an invoice via Square API.

patterns.match: No payments found|Payment lookup failed|Square API error.*payments
patterns.fix: Verify Square credentials and date range. Check Square Dashboard for payment status.
patterns.description: Failed to retrieve payment information from Square.

patterns.match: entity.*does not exist|table.*not found|cr4b4_cheekyorders.*404|Resource not found.*cheekyorders
patterns.fix: Ensure CheekyOrders table exists in Dataverse. Re-import the solution or create the table manually.

patterns.match: Failed to get Dataverse token|pac auth token.*failed|Bearer token.*empty
patterns.fix: Run pac auth create to re-authenticate, or verify ENV_URL is correct.
patterns.description: Could not obtain a Dataverse access token.
